_comment: Canonical device config. Server owns: channels, fallback, poll_interval_s, low_batt_interval_s. Pico owns local-only knobs: server_url + tokens come from secrets (never committed), epaper_rev, battery.*. See SCHEMA.md sec 7 and docs/layout-specs.md sec 6.

firmware._comment: Local-only Pico knobs. server_url and the device bearer token live in secrets.example.py, NOT here.
